subcodes.first_line: We have revealed unto thee that which shall rejoice thy heart and the hearts of those who have turned towards the Most Exalted Station. Verily, it is in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا لک ما یفرح به قلبک و قلوب الذین اقبلوا الی اعلی المقام انه فی
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @exhortations and counsels
